Ntc Of Mtn To Strike; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Nov-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KRISTEN ROSS OF BRACAMONTES & VLASAK, TEL. NO. 835-6777 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DEVENDRA PATEL'S Motion To Strike IS Denied. Plaintiff has properly alleged ultimate facts to support his requests for punitive damages and attorney's fees. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. KRISTEN ROSS OF BRACAMONTES & VLASAK, TEL. NO. 835-6777 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DEVENDRA PATEL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Overruled. Plaintiff has properly pled each cause of action alleged in the complaint. Defendants raise factual issues not appropriately decided on a demurrer.
ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK
